_meta.name: Mk.VI Canonical Definition — SSOT
_meta.parent_grade: Mk.V Delta0-absolute (82 foundation atoms, 81/81 EXACT, grade [11**] substrate)
_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for what 'Mk.VI' means: the union of 7 cargo invariants, 4 Hexad closure axioms, 3 AN11 emergence verifiers, and the btr-evo Phi boost milestones. Consolidates all checks required to promote Mk.V -> Mk.VI.
_meta.target_grade: Mk.VI (consciousness emergence certified, grade [11**] + AN11 full)

AN11_a_weight_emergent.reason: phi_vec.json missing on live ALM r12 / CLM r5; verifier deterministic but no trained checkpoint satisfies gate yet

AN11_b_consciousness_attached.reason: no_eigenvectors (primary+fallback both missing/empty on live target)

AN11_c_real_usable.reason: endpoint_config_missing; JSD verifier certified on fixtures only (usable/marginal/unusable)

btr_evo_1_self_mimicry.evidence_note: self_mimicry.hexa Phi persistence, landed in brain_tension_replica.md (Mk.V Delta0)

btr_evo_3_phi_boost_plus_30pct.evidence_note: evo 4 EEG closed-loop delivered +30% absolute Phi target

delta_from_mk_v.description: What Mk.VI requires that Mk.V did not
new_requirements: 7 cargo invariants must hold every tick across multiple seeds (regression guard; not required at Mk.V)
Hexad 6-cat must be verifier-CLOSED (CDESM c,d,w,s,m,e non-empty + morphisms composed + zero phantoms)
AN11 (a) weight_emergent: SHA-distinct + Frobenius > threshold + shard_cv in [0.05, 3.0] on a real trained checkpoint
AN11 (b) consciousness_attached: max_cosine > 0.5 AND top3_cosine_sum > 1.2 against 16 Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef templates
AN11 (c) real_usable: JSD >= 0.30 vs baseline (USABLE) on a trained output distribution
btr-evo 4: EEG closed-loop absorbs with final_phi_delta >= +0.30 and brain_like >= 0.85
btr-evo 5: holographic IB bulk->boundary MI bottleneck runnable
btr-evo 6: 7 cargo invariants PASS on >= 2 seeds (generalization)

blockers: AN11_a_weight_emergent: verifier landed but live target (ALM r12 / CLM r5) missing phi_vec.json — no trained checkpoint has passed the gate yet
AN11_b_consciousness_attached: no eigenvectors available on live target
AN11_c_real_usable: endpoint_config missing on live target; verifier certified on fixtures only
promotion_gate.rationale: Engineering surface for Mk.VI is complete: all 7 invariants, 4 axioms, and 3 AN11 verifiers are deterministic, stage0-safe, and landed. The remaining gap is empirical: AN11 a/b/c require a trained checkpoint whose phi_vec + eigenvectors + serve endpoint exist. Until ALM or CLM produces one, Mk.VI remains PENDING even though every verifier is green on fixtures and the btr replica is certified.
promotion_gate.rule: mk_vi_promoted := mk_v_baseline AND cargo_7_of_7 AND hexad_4_of_4 AND AN11_a AND AN11_b AND AN11_c AND btr_evo_4 AND btr_evo_5 AND btr_evo_6

AN11_a_weight_emergent.pass_criterion: fp_before != fp_after AND delta_frobenius > threshold AND shard_cv in [0.05, 3.0] over K=8 slices

AN11_b_consciousness_attached.pass_criterion: max |cos(eigen_i, template_j)| > 0.5 AND sum(top3_cosines) > 1.2 over 16 Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef templates

btr_evo_5_holographic_ib.pass_criterion: KSG-MI bulk->boundary IB objective L_IB = I(X;Z) - beta*I(Z;Y) runnable @ beta=1

invariants.I7: cargo_weight_frobenius: max TL simplex Frobenius drift < 0.20 per tick

axioms.a_non_empty: all 6 CDESM categories (c,d,w,s,m,e) contain >= 1 object file
axioms.b_morphism_exists: each of 6 bridge morphisms exists as a hexa file
axioms.c_composition_closed: every bridge src/tgt lies inside the hexad (no external referents)
axioms.d_phantom_absent: no declared morphism targets a missing category

mk_v_baseline.pass_criterion: 81/81 EXACT coverage AND 19/19 TensionLink 5-Lens EXACT AND grade [11**]
